description: Visual design system for Declassified Cases documents. All documents share this language.

stamps.confidential: Text 'CONFIDENTIAL' rotated -15deg, color #cc0000, opacity 0.25, font Impact 28pt, positioned bottom-right
stamps.evidence: Text 'EVIDENCE' in bordered rectangle, color #cc0000, opacity 0.8, font mono 10pt, centered top
stamps.restricted: Text 'RESTRICTED' top-right corner, mono 8pt, bordered box, color #8b0000
stamps.declassified: Text 'DECLASSIFIED' diagonal across page, font Impact 48pt, color #cc0000, opacity 0.08
stamps.digital_evidence: Text 'DIGITAL EVIDENCE' in bordered rectangle, color #cc0000, centered

effects.paper_texture: Use CSS: background-image with subtle repeating noise pattern or set background-color to #f5f0e8 for cream paper feel
effects.coffee_stain: Optional: circular radial-gradient in brown (#8B4513) at 0.04 opacity, random position, 60-80px diameter
effects.fold_lines: Optional: very subtle 1px lines at 33% and 66% height, color rgba(0,0,0,0.03)
effects.tape: Semi-transparent yellow (#fff59d) rectangles at corners, slight rotation, 40x15px, opacity 0.6
effects.staple: Small 3x8px dark gray rectangle at top-left, with slight shadow
effects.redaction_bar: Black rectangle over text, sometimes with visible text underneath at low opacity

evidence_header.style: font-family mono, font-size 9pt, text-align center, color #999, padding 8px, border-bottom 1px solid #ddd

footer.text: Prepared for training / investigative simulation. All content is fictional within this case universe.
footer.style: font-size 8pt, text-align center, color #999, padding-top 16px, border-top 1px solid #eee, margin-top 24px

rules.all_css_inline: ALL CSS must be in a <style> block. No external stylesheets.
rules.all_images_base64: ALL images must be embedded as base64 data URIs in
rules.print_friendly: Must render correctly with Chromium printBackground: true
rules.max_pages: Most documents should be 1-2 pages. Interviews/transcripts may be 3-8 pages.
rules.text_never_in_images: ALL text must be HTML text. Never rely on text rendered inside AI-generated images.
rules.every_doc_unique: Each document should have subtle visual variations — no two documents should look identical even if same type
